description:
Capability identifiers advertised in `Info.capabilities`.

Variants are appended in the order in which they are surfaced. Step 6 extends the deterministic ordering to `[Info, Tap, Wait, Screenshot]`. Step 7 appends `Events` for the `WS /test/events` channel.
